'''Hugo Cutter''' was a son of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] nobility who was enrolled at the [[Imperial Engineers Academy]], but instead of fixing things, he gained a love for demolitions and was disbarred from the academy for destroying equipment.

==Biography==
What happened to him after that is unknown, but he eventually became a [[demolitions expert]] and may have joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] or the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] due to the fact he had had run ins with [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and later joined the mercenary group [[Red Moons]] and participated in the mission to [[Gabredor III/Legends|Gabredor III]]. While there he saved the team from walking into a large pit of explosives. He was considered quite eccentric and could very well have been mentally insane. Fellow team member [[Brixie Ergo]] believed he belonged in a [[psychotrauma ward]]. He wore his hair in a frazzled style.

He was present in [[Nexus City]] on [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]] with Stormcaller, [[Ivey]], and [[Sully Tigereye]] as they planned to disrupt the [[Lunar Night]] festivities. He used his [[bioinduction gun]] on [[Rollos]] to knock out the [[Gigoran/Legends|Gigoran]].<ref name="AJ4">{{JournalCite|4|It's a Gambler's Life}}</ref>
